title: Comfortable
description: Minecraft with a few farming and QOL mods to give it a lowly, "turn-your-brain-off" aesthetic and feel.
body:
![Comfortable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbc8601db2527ceb4c34e728247303d6fb5aac58_0.webp)
--------------------------------------------------------------
_Minecraft_ is a blank canvas where we can make it however we see fit. From _RPG's_ to _Roguelikes_, this wonderful game can be expressed in a variety of genres without being "boring". 

**Comfortable** is a modpack that aims to just add the simple QOL mods (as well as many, many farming-esque mods) to bring you an enjoyabale experience where you can set up a humble abode and do as you please, whether that be _trading with the villagers_, _pursuing the Ender Dragon_, or _raising chickens_; the opportunities here are _endless_! 

Minecraft with extra steps, to make your game more **Comfortable** :)

--------------------------------------------------------------

For copyright reasons (and as a shout-out), please check out Aquaculture (2) by Shadow on Curseforge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
